summary: Shaky bystander cellphone footage of a person walking down a grassy lake bank toward a white SUV that has rolled into the water - per the tweet, a driver who stopped to protest an ICE enforcement but failed to put the car in park. Audio is casual onlooker chatter ('That sucks... Lucy the car got lost'), with no music, stylized editing, color grade, graphics, or end card. It is a raw mockery/viral clip, not a produced music-driven piece, so it is out of scope despite a high automated music_score.
notable_text: If you're going to stop your car to protest an ICE enforcement... at least put your car into park
